Name: Aetherpassage
Rules Text: After a player activates a system, you may allow that player to move their ships through system that contain your ships.

Name: Amalgamation
Rules Text: When you produce a unit, you may return 1 captured unit of that type to produce that unit without spending resources.

Name: Ambush
Rules Text: At the start of a space combat, you may roll 1 die for each of up to 2 of your cruisers or destroyers in the system. For each result equal to or greater than that ship's combat value produce 1 hit; your opponent must assign it to 1 of their ships.

Name: Analytical
Rules Text: When you research a technology that is not a unit upgrade technology, you may ignore 1 prerequisite.

Name: Arbiters
Rules Text: When you are negotiating a transaction, action cards can be exchanged as part of that transaction.

Name: Armada
Rules Text: The maximum number of non-fighter ships you can have in each system is equal to 2 more than the number of tokens in your fleet pool.

Name: Assail - Plot
Rules Text: Firmament Plot Card\nApply + 1 to the results of each of your combat and unit ability rolls against the puppeted player.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Enervate - Plot, Siphon - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Assimilate
Rules Text: When you gain control of a planet, replace each PDS and space dock that is on that planet with a matching unit from your reinforcements.

Name: Awaken
Rules Text: After you activate a system that contains 1 or more of your sleeper tokens, you may replace each of those tokens with 1 PDS from your reinforcements.

Name: Blood Ties
Rules Text: You do not have to spend influence to remove the custodians token from Mecatol Rex.

Name: Brilliant
Rules Text: When you spend a command token to resolve the secondary ability of the "Technology" strategy card, you may resolve the primary ability instead.

Name: Coalescence
Rules Text: If your flagship or your Awaken faction ability places units into the same space area or onto the same planet as another player's units, your units must participate in combat during the "Space Combat" or "Ground Combat" steps.

Name: Council Patronage
Rules Text: Replenish your commodities at the start of the strategy phase, then gain 1 trade good.

Name: Crafty
Rules Text: You can have any number of action cards in your hand. Game effects cannot prevent you from using this ability.

Name: Creuss Gate
Rules Text: When you create the game board, place the Creuss Gate (tile 17) where your home system would normally be placed. The Creuss Gate system is not a home system. Then place your home system (tile 51) in your play area.

Name: Dark Whispers
Rules Text: During setup, take the additional Empyrean faction promissory note; you have 2 faction promissory notes.
Notes: See also: Blood Pact, Dark Pact (in promissories)

Name: Devotion
Rules Text: After each space battle round, you may destroy 1 of your cruisers or destroyers in the active system to produce 1 hit and assign it to 1 of your opponent's ships in that system.

Name: Devour
Rules Text: Capture your opponent's non-structure units that are destroyed during combat.

Name: Distant Suns
Rules Text: When you explore a planet that contains 1 of your mechs, you may draw 1 additional card; choose 1 to resolve and discard the rest.

Name: Edict
Rules Text: When you win a combat, place 1 command token from your opponent's reinforcements in your fleet pool if it does not already contain 1 of that player's tokens; other players' tokens in your fleet pool increase your fleet limit but cannot be redistributed.

Name: Enervate - Plot
Rules Text: Firmament Plot Card\nYou can perform the secondary abilities of the puppeted player's strategy cards without spending command tokens; for "Leadership," you can perform the primary ability instead.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Siphon - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Assail - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Extract - Plot
Rules Text: Firmament Plot Card\nWhen this card is revealed, gain 1 non-faction technology owned by the puppeted player.\nWhen the puppeted player gains a non-faction technology, you may spend 4 resources to gain that technology.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Enervate - Plot, Siphon - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Assail - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Fabrication
Rules Text: **Action:** Either purge 2 of your relic fragments of the same type to gain 1 relic or purge 1 of your relic fragments to gain 1 command token.

Name: Foresight
Rules Text: After another player moves ships into a system that contains 1 or more of your ships, you may place 1 token from your strategy pool in an adjacent system that does not contain another player's ships; move your ships from the active system into that system.

Name: Fragile
Rules Text: Apply -1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls.

Name: Future Sight
Rules Text: During the agenda phase, after an outcome you voted for or predicted is resolved, gain 1 trade good.

Name: Galactic Threat
Rules Text: You cannot vote on agendas. Once per agenda phase, after an agenda is revealed, you may predict aloud the outcome of that agenda. If your prediction is correct, gain 1 technology that is owned by a player who voted how you predicted.

Name: Galvanize
Rules Text: When a game effect instructs a player to galvanize a unit, they place a galvanize token beneath it if it does not have one. Galvanized units roll 1 additional die for combat rolls and unit abilities.

Name: Gashlai Physiology
Rules Text: Your ships can move through supernovas.

Name: Guild Ships
Rules Text: You can negotiate transactions with players who are not your neighbor.

Name: Harrow
Rules Text: At the end of each round of ground combat, your ships in the active system may use their _Bombardment_ abilities against your opponent's ground forces on the planet.

Name: Hubris
Rules Text: During setup, purge your "Alliance" promissory note. Other players cannot give you their "Alliance" promissory notes.

Name: Imperia
Rules Text: While another player's command token is in your fleet pool, you can use the ability of that player's commander, if it's unlocked.

Name: Incursion
Rules Text: When you activate a system that contains a breach, you may flip that breach; systems that contain active breaches are adjacent. At the end of the status phase, any player with ships in a system that contains an active breach may remove that breach.

Name: Indoctrination
Rules Text: At the start of a ground combat, you may spend 2 influence to replace 1 of your opponent's participating infantry with 1 infantry from your reinforcements.

Name: Law's Order
Rules Text: You may spend 1 trade good or 1 commodity at the start of any player's turn to treat all laws as blank until the end of that turn.

Name: Liberate
Rules Text: When you gain control of a planet, ready that planet if it contains a number of your infantry equal to or greater than that planet's resource value; otherwise, place 1 infantry on that planet.

Name: Marionettes
Rules Text: The player or players whose control tokens are on each plot card are the puppeted players for that plot.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Enervate - Plot, Siphon - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Assail - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Masters of Trade
Rules Text: You do not have to spend a command token to resolve the secondary ability of the "Trade" strategy card.

Name: Miniaturization
Rules Text: Your structures can be transported by any ship; this does not require or count against capacity. While your structures are in the space area, they cannot use their units abilities. At the end of your tactical actions, you may place your structures that are in space areas onto planets you control in their respective systems.

Name: Mitosis
Rules Text: Your space docks cannot produce infantry. At the start of the status phase, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on any planet you control.

Name: Munitions Reserves
Rules Text: At the start of each round of space combat, you may spend 2 trade goods; you may reroll any number of your dice during that combat round.
Notes: You can only reroll combat rolls, not other dice rolled during that round of combat.

Name: Nocturne
Rules Text: This faction cannot be chosen during setup.

Name: Nomadic
Rules Text: You can score objectives even if you do not control the planets in your home system.

Name: Oceanbound
Rules Text: When your units begin coexisting on a planet, gain an ocean card and ready it. Any time you have more ocean cards than there are planets that contain your coexisting units, discard ocean cards until you do not.
Notes: See also: Brine Pool, Coral Reef, Deep Abyss, Ice Shelf, Lost Fleet (in planets)

Name: Orbital Drop
Rules Text: **Action:** Spend 1 token from your strategy pool to place 2 infantry from your reinforcements on 1 planet you control.

Name: Peace Accords
Rules Text: After you resolve the primary or secondary ability of the "Diplomacy" strategy card, you may gain control of 1 planet other than Mecatol Rex that does not contain any units and is in a system that is adjacent to a planet you control.

Name: Phoenix Standard
Rules Text: At the end of combat, you may galvanize 1 of your units that participated.

Name: Pillage
Rules Text: After 1 of your neighbors gains trade goods or resolves a transaction, if that neighbor has 3 or more trade goods, you may take 1 of their trade goods or commodities.
Notes: Cannot use Pillage off of effects that would convert your own commodities to trade goods.

Name: Plots Within Plots
Rules Text: You can score secret objectives already scored by other players if you fulfill their requirements; this does not count against your secret objective limit or the number you can score in a round. When you score another player's secret objective, do not gain a victory point; instead, place a facedown plot card into your play area with that player's control token on it.
Notes: See also: Enervate - Plot, Siphon - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Assail - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Propagation
Rules Text: You cannot research technology. When you would research a technology, gain 3 command tokens instead.

Name: Puppets of the Blade
Rules Text: If you have at least 1 plot card in your play area, gain the following ability:\n\t**Action:** Purge The Firmament's faction sheet, leaders, planet cards, and promissory note. Then, gain all of the faction components for The Obsidian.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Enervate - Plot, Siphon - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Assail - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Quantum Entanglement
Rules Text: You treat all systems that contain either an alpha or a beta wormhole as adjacent to each other. Game effects cannot prevent you from using this ability.

Name: Quash
Rules Text: When an agenda is revealed, you may spend 1 token from your strategy pool to discard that agenda and reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck. Players vote on this agenda instead.

Name: Raid Formation
Rules Text: When 1 or more of your units use _Anti-Fighter Barrage_, for each hit produced in excess of your opponent's fighters, choose 1 of your opponent's ships that has _Sustain Damage_ to become damaged.

Name: Reclamation
Rules Text: After you resolve a tactical action during which you gained control of Mecatol Rex, you may place 1 PDS and 1 space dock from your reinforcements on Mecatol Rex.

Name: Research Team
Rules Text: When ground forces are committed, if your units on that planet are not already coexisting, you may choose for your units to coexist.

Name: Riftmeld
Rules Text: When you research a unit upgrade technology, you may return 1 captured unit of that type to ignore all of that technology's prerequisites.

Name: Scavenge
Rules Text: After you gain control of a planet, gain 1 trade good.

Name: Scheming
Rules Text: When you draw 1 or more action cards, draw 1 additional action card. Then, choose and discard 1 action card from your hand.

Name: Sea of Tears
Rules Text: When you create the game board, place The Sorrow (tile 94) where your home system would be placed, and place an inactive breach in it. The Sorrow is not a home system. Then, place your home system (tile 118) in your play area.

Name: Seethe - Plot
Rules Text: Firmament Plot Card\nWhen this card is revealed, destroy all units on a non-home planet controlled by the puppeted player.\nAt the start of the status phase, destroy 1 of the puppeted player's infantry in any system.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Enervate - Plot, Siphon - Plot, Assail - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Siphon - Plot
Rules Text: Firmament Plot Card\nWhen the puppeted player gains commodities, you gain an equal number of trade goods.
Notes: See also: Plots Within Plots, Enervate - Plot, Seethe - Plot, Assail - Plot, Extract - Plot (in abilities)

Name: Slipstream
Rules Text: During your tactical actions, apply +1 to the move value of each of your ships that starts its movement in your home system or in a system that contains either an alpha or beta wormhole.

Name: Stall Tactics
Rules Text: **Action:** Discard 1 action card from your hand.

Name: Star Forge
Rules Text: **Action:** Spend 1 token from your strategy pool to place either 2 fighters or 1 destroyer from your reinforcements in a system that contains 1 or more of your war suns.

Name: Sundered
Rules Text: You cannot use wormholes other than epsilon wormholes. Other players' units that move or are placed into your home system are destroyed.

Name: Survival Instinct
Rules Text: After another player activates a system that contains your ships, you may move up to 2 of your ships into the active system from adjacent systems that do not contain your command tokens.

Name: Technological Singularity
Rules Text: Once per combat, after 1 of your opponent's units is destroyed, you may gain 1 technology that is owned by that player.

Name: Telepathic
Rules Text: At the end of the strategy phase, place the Naalu "0" token on your strategy card; you are first in initiative order.

Name: Terragenesis
Rules Text: After you explore a planet that does not have a sleeper token, you may place or move 1 sleeper token onto that planet.

Name: The Blade's Orchestra
Rules Text: When this faction comes into play, flip your home system, double-sided faction components, and all of your in-play plot cards. Then, ready Cronos Hollow and Tallin Hollow if you control them.

Name: The Company
Rules Text: During setup, take the 2 additional Nomad faction agents and place them next to your faction sheet; you have 3 agents.
Notes: See also: Artuno the Betrayer, Field Marshall Mercer, The Thundarian (in leaders)

Name: The Tribunii
Rules Text: During setup, choose a Keleres hero that corresponds to an unused faction; take that faction𠏋 home system, command tokens, and control tokens. The unchosen Keleres heroes are not used.
Notes: Updated wording in Thunder's Edge.\nSee also: Kuuasi Aun Jalatai, Odlynn Myrr, Harka Leeds (in leaders)

Name: Unrelenting
Rules Text: Apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls.

Name: Versatile
Rules Text: When you gain command tokens during the status phase, gain 1 additional command token.

Name: Voidborn
Rules Text: Nebulae do not affect your ships' movement.

Name: Zeal
Rules Text: You always vote first during the agenda phase. When you cast at least 1 vote, cast 1 additional vote for each player in the game, including you.
Notes: Other than the Argent player, all players vote in regular order (left of speaker, then clockwise).
